title: Roadster 2 Key Bicycle Cable Lock Security Bike Cycle Gate 10mm x 650mm
features: Steel Cable Core With Plastic Sleeve
description: Bicycle cable lock with 2 keys and steel cable core with plastic sleeve for protection. Ideal for bicycles, gates etc. 10 mm x 650 mm. 2 keys included.
